title: Artifact for ICSE 2027 - Build Phases are Naturally Isolated: An Empirical Study of Build System File Access Patterns
author: Anonymous
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This artifact contains the PhaseBench benchmark, collected file access patterns, reported results on phase isolation, the Filetrace tool for collecting file access patterns, scripts used to run experiments and analyze their results, and relevant test cases.
steps_raw: This artifact contains the PhaseBench benchmark, collected file access patterns, reported results on phase isolation, the Filetrace tool for collecting file access patterns, scripts used to run experiments and analyze their results, and relevant test cases.
